specs.reason: Top-level architecture spec for the grid system, defines crate boundaries and relationships that will change
DB layer architecture spec — the db module moves into the consolidated crate, Morton encoding and WAL integration preserved

codebase_context.summary: 6 grid crates in workspace. Cross-crate dependency graph: formula->core, history->core+formula, db->core+cclab-wal, server->core+db+cclab-kv, wasm->core+formula+history. Server has a binary target (main.rs). Internal imports use cclab_grid_core::, cclab_grid_formula::, etc. patterns across ~30 import sites. cclab-grid-db also uses explicit version numbers instead of workspace versions.
